metadata.creator: United States Senate Select Committee
metadata.description:
PLEASE READ:

The best files are the ones that begin with underscore characters ("_Book-I_Foreign-and-Military-Intelligence" for example). These are the full books. The other files are portions of the books.

Audio Books of Sections of These Reports

are available on YouTube: HERE.
Final Report of United States Senate Select Committee to Study Governmental Operations with Respect to Intelligence Activities (Church Committee)

Five Books (Foreign Intel, Domestic Intel, Case Studies, the NSA, and the JFK Assassination), the Interim Report (Foreign Assassinations), plus Seven Volumes of Testimony.

Also, I found audio of some of the hearings which can be found by clicking this text. People should also be aware that C-SPAN presented several of the hearings, as filmed for television, on their site. People should go check them out. The audio I linked here, though, has Important (the most important IMHO) hearings not presented by C-SPAN.


From Wikipedia:

The Church Committee was the United States Senate Select Committee to Study Governmental Operations with Respect to Intelligence Activities, a U.S. Senate committee chaired by Senator Frank Church (D-ID) in 1975. A precursor to the U.S. Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, the committee investigated intelligence gathering for illegality by the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA),National Security Agency (NSA) and Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) after certain activities had been revealed by the Watergate affair.
